subject: fix(ui): add tooltip a11y, fix effect deps, extract spinner sizes to CSS
body:
Three fixes from post-implementation review:

1. HeatmapTooltip: add role="tooltip" and aria-hidden for screen readers,
   add [tooltip.visible, tooltip.rect] dependency array to positioning
   useEffect — was running on every render without deps

2. Extract inline spinner style={{}} to CSS size variant classes
   (loading-spinner-sm/md/lg) — CLAUDE.md prohibits inline styles
   for non-dynamic values. Fixed in App.jsx, Timeline.jsx, Projects.jsx,
   and Discover.jsx

3. Verified console.error/warn statements are intentional error handling
   (not debug logging) — kept per AI_MISTAKES.md 2026-02-11 lesson

Tags: accessibility, bugfix, ui, cleanup
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: react-migration
